# tsb Provider

Manage Tetrate Service Bridge (TSB) resources via the TSB v2 API.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ca_file` (String) Path to a PEM CA bundle used to verify the TSB server certificate. May also be set via the TSB_CA_FILE environment variable.
- `endpoint` (String) TSB gRPC endpoint (host:port). May also be set via the TSB_ENDPOINT environment variable.
- `organization` (String) TSB organization the resources belong to. May also be set via the TSB_ORG environment variable.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for HTTP Basic authentication, used together with `username`. May also be set via the TSB_PASSWORD environment variable.
- `tls_disabled` (Boolean) Disable transport security entirely (plaintext). May also be set via the TSB_TLS_DISABLED environment variable.
- `tls_insecure` (Boolean) Keep TLS enabled but skip server certificate verification. May also be set via the TSB_TLS_INSECURE environment variable.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) TSB API token sent in the x-tetrate-token header. Takes precedence over username/password. May also be set via the TSB_TOKEN environment variable.
- `username` (String) Username for HTTP Basic authentication, used when `token` is not set. May also be set via the TSB_USERNAME environment variable.
